content: An autonomous agent with an Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) can use GraphRAG's hierarchical knowledge graph structure to actively prioritize unexplored or weakly connected knowledge nodes for intrinsic reward, turning open-ended knowledge exploration from unstructured text into a curiosity-driven reinforcement learning task. This creates a self-improving system that automatically expands and refines its knowledge graph by following the agent's innate curiosity to fill information gaps.
